summary: Iteration 20: Tested PDF export (all options), Excel export with _Opts sheet, Excel import, CMS PDF config. Backend 11/12 pass. 1 test failure is expected business logic (import on submitted session returns 409). Frontend PDF Settings page fully verified.

minor.issue: Returns 409 ALREADY_SUBMITTED — correct behavior, submitted sessions cannot be re-imported. Test spec pointed to wrong session. Import works correctly on draft/in-progress sessions.

action_items: From iter19 (still outstanding): AssessmentV2Taking.jsx not wired to App.js route /portal/assessments/:sessionId — Excel import/export buttons unreachable in assessment taking flow.
critical_code_review_comments: Excel import endpoint correctly blocks import on already-submitted sessions (409). Test spec used wrong session ID. No code issue.
Outstanding from iter18/19: AssessmentV2Taking.jsx route not in App.js.

success_rate.backend: 92% (11/12 tests pass, 1 failure is expected behavior)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (PDF Settings page, Generate Preview, iframe all working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (PDF export with all options, Excel _Opts sheet, CMS PDF config) are working correctly. Import 409 on submitted session is correct behavior. Frontend PDF Settings page verified: page loads, Generate Preview button works, iframe displays PDF (blob URL). Outstanding: AssessmentV2Taking.jsx not in App.js routing.
rca_of_issue: Excel import 409: API correctly prevents modifying already-submitted sessions. Test spec in review_request used the submitted session ID (912ff0c5) for import test — should use a draft/in-progress session instead.
